name: Apple Crunch Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Apples: thinly sliced and pared
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease a 9 x 9 inch square pan.
3. In a large bowl, mix the Bisquick, milk, sugar, and egg. Beat vigorously for 30 seconds.
4. Spread half of the batter in the prepared pan.
5. Arrange apple slices on top of the batter, then sprinkle with half of the streusel topping.
6. Spread the remaining batter over the apple slices, then sprinkle with the remaining streusel topping and nuts.
7. Bake for about 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
9. For the glaze, whisk together powdered sugar and milk until smooth.
10. Drizzle the glaze over the cooled cake.
